summary: Synthetic demo packet showing how a PI agent records a metadata refresh for GB 7258-2017 without storing standard text.

changed_provisions.summary: Synthetic review item: confirm status and replacement metadata before answering.

review_tasks.title: Confirm GB 7258 metadata before next demo release
review_tasks.reason: Public metadata can change and should be checked before a new answer packet is generated.

unresolved_issues: This is a synthetic metadata-refresh example, not a substantive GB 7258 revision analysis.
